# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud monitoring.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Web/sites"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('webAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]"
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: "AzureWebJobsStorage"
            value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2021-04-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=core.windows.net')]"
          - name: "SqlConnectionString"
            value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('sqlAdminUser'), ';Password=', parameters('sqlAdminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminUser')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      edition: "Standard"
      requestedServiceObjective: "S1"
  - type: "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"
    apiVersion: "2021-04-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: "Standard_LRS"
    kind: "StorageV2"
parameters:
  webAppName:
    type: string
  appServicePlanName:
    type: string
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
  sqlAdminUser:
    type: string
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
